title: Baa! Baa! Black Sheep
content:
"Baa! Baa! Black sheep, have you any wool?"
    "Yes, marry, have I, three bags full;
    One for my master, and one for my dame,
    But none for the little boy that lives down the lane!"
meaning:
"Baa! Baa! Black Sheep" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
